'''竏喩-r-b''' ('''kagarab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hippocampectomize|hippocampectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hippocampectomize|hippocampectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喩-r-b
|-
! Lemma
| kagarab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigarab|thigarab]] || [[word:jigarab|jigarab]] || [[word:shigarab|shigarab]] || [[word:kigarab|kigarab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugarab|thuthugarab]] || [[word:jujugarab|jujugarab]] || [[word:shushugarab|shushugarab]] || [[word:kukugarab|kukugarab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugarab|thugarab]] || [[word:jugarab|jugarab]] || [[word:shugarab|shugarab]] || [[word:kugarab|kugarab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugarab|thugarab]] || [[word:jugarab|jugarab]] || [[word:shugarab|shugarab]] || [[word:kugarab|kugarab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegarab|thegarab]] || [[word:jegarab|jegarab]] || [[word:shegarab|shegarab]] || [[word:kegarab|kegarab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogarab|thothogarab]] || [[word:jojogarab|jojogarab]] || [[word:shoshogarab|shoshogarab]] || [[word:kokogarab|kokogarab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogarab|thogarab]] || [[word:jogarab|jogarab]] || [[word:shogarab|shogarab]] || [[word:kogarab|kogarab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogarab|thogarab]] || [[word:jogarab|jogarab]] || [[word:shogarab|shogarab]] || [[word:kogarab|kogarab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]] || [[word:garab|garab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦgarab|thﾃｦgarab]] || [[word:jﾃｦgarab|jﾃｦgarab]] || [[word:shﾃｦgarab|shﾃｦgarab]] || [[word:kﾃｦgarab|kﾃｦgarab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagarab|thathagarab]] || [[word:jajagarab|jajagarab]] || [[word:shashagarab|shashagarab]] || [[word:kakagarab|kakagarab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagarab|thagarab]] || [[word:jagarab|jagarab]] || [[word:shagarab|shagarab]] || [[word:kagarab|kagarab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagarab|thagarab]] || [[word:jagarab|jagarab]] || [[word:shagarab|shagarab]] || [[word:kagarab|kagarab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagarab|shagarab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagarab|goshagarab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagarab|gokishagarab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagarabnﾃｼ|shagarabnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagarabnknﾃｼ|goshagarabnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagarabnﾃｼ|gokishagarabnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagarabshﾃｫ|shagarabshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagarabnkshﾃｫ|goshagarabnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagarabshﾃｫ|gokishagarabshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagarabro|shagarabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagarabnkro|goshagarabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagarabro|gokishagarabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagarabmu|shagarabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagarabnkmu|goshagarabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagarabmu|gokishagarabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagarabsher|shagarabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagarabnksher|goshagarabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagarabsher|gokishagarabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagarabng|shagarabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagarabnkng|goshagarabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagarabng|gokishagarabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagarabya|shagarabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagarabnkya|goshagarabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagarabya|gokishagarabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagarabyam|shagarabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagarabnkyam|goshagarabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagarabyam|gokishagarabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagarabnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shagarabnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagarabnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshagarabnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagarabnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishagarabnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagarabnﾃｼro|shagarabnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagarabnknﾃｼro|goshagarabnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagarabnﾃｼro|gokishagarabnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagarabnﾃｼmu|shagarabnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagarabnknﾃｼmu|goshagarabnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagarabnﾃｼmu|gokishagarabnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagarabshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shagarabshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagarabnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshagarabnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagarabshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishagarabshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagarabshﾃｫro|shagarabshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagarabnkshﾃｫro|goshagarabnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagarabshﾃｫro|gokishagarabshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagarabshﾃｫmu|shagarabshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagarabnkshﾃｫmu|goshagarabnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagarabshﾃｫmu|gokishagarabshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagarabronﾃｼ|shagarabronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagarabnkronﾃｼ|goshagarabnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagarabronﾃｼ|gokishagarabronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagarabroshﾃｫ|shagarabroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagarabnkroshﾃｫ|goshagarabnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagarabroshﾃｫ|gokishagarabroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagarabromu|shagarabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagarabnkromu|goshagarabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagarabromu|gokishagarabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagarabmunﾃｼ|shagarabmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagarabnkmunﾃｼ|goshagarabnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagarabmunﾃｼ|gokishagarabmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagarabmushﾃｫ|shagarabmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagarabnkmushﾃｫ|goshagarabnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagarabmushﾃｫ|gokishagarabmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagarabmuro|shagarabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagarabnkmuro|goshagarabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagarabmuro|gokishagarabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
